TAGS normal SMALLTAG normal BIGTAG normal DOUBLESMALL supSUPTAG.

INLINE normal INLINE070 normal.

INDENT
MARGINLEFT3EM

UNITS normal EM120 OUTER150 INNER075 REM060 normal.

OPENER160 whole paragraph.

FOOTNOTE080 whole paragraph.

SUPCSS referenceSUPCSS42 and sub HSUBTAGO.

CLAMP HUGEWORD alpha beta gamma delta epsilon zeta TINYWORD tail.
